# comfyui_job (Data Source)

Retrieves details of a specific job from the ComfyUI server.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the job.

### Read-Only

- `create_time` (Number) Unix timestamp when the job was created.
- `execution_end_time` (Number) Unix timestamp when job execution ended.
- `execution_error` (Dynamic) Structured execution error data.
- `execution_error_json` (String) JSON representation of execution error (if any).
- `execution_start_time` (Number) Unix timestamp when job execution started.
- `execution_status` (Dynamic) Structured execution status data.
- `execution_status_json` (String) JSON representation of execution status.
- `outputs` (Dynamic) Structured job outputs data.
- `outputs_count` (Number) Number of outputs produced by the job.
- `outputs_json` (String) JSON representation of job outputs.
- `preview_output` (Dynamic) Structured preview output data.
- `preview_output_json` (String) JSON representation of preview output.
- `priority` (Number) The priority of the job.
- `status` (String) The current status of the job (e.g., pending, running, completed, error).
- `workflow` (Dynamic) Structured workflow data.
- `workflow_id` (String) The workflow ID associated with this job.
- `workflow_json` (String) JSON representation of the workflow.
